violations.text: The outside dumpster area was observed with an excess of debris and litter. Dumpster areas must be maintained. Establishment has placed a service call to have dumpster area cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2026
Ceiling tile was observed with water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2026
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the walk in cooler door. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2025
